title: Operator Window General Page
description:
Operator Window General Page

Operator Window General Page

This page allows you to configure the general settings for the Operator Window.

How to Access

Select Properties from the Project menu.  Select Operator Settings.  Select Operator Window.  Select General.

Item	Description

Window Title	Type in the title that you want to appear
		 at the top of the operator window.

Window Size	Choose Normal (normal size, centered
		 on screen) or Maximized (full screen).

Font	Click on the Font button to open the
		 fonts dialog.  Choose the font you desire for the operator
		 window.  The current font name and size is displayed next
		 to the Font button.

Apply	Set current values after changes have
		 been made.

Restore	Revert back to the previous values.

Close	Close the Project Properties dialog.
